case_title: MARIA MENDOZA VS. RODAEL ALFONSO MALDONADO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MARIEL FALKA (FOR PLAINTIFF). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-12-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER--MARTA RIESEN. SPANISH INTERPRETER ORDERED FOR THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT IS REQUIRED TO BRING HIS OWN SPANISH INTERPRETER TO NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
